# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-16

GitHub Tools can now mint short-lived scoped GitHub tokens through Vercel Connect instead of storing PATs.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Vercel Connect support in GitHub Tools
   Cuts secret sprawl in agent workflows and changes how to wire GitHub auth on Vercel.

2. Detecting Full Table Scans With SQLite
   Direct performance guardrail idea for Rails/SQLite stacks with low implementation overhead.

3. A Filtering engine and DB for unpropagated kernel security patches
   Useful for infrastructure/security monitoring if you rely on distro kernels and want lag visibility.

4. elfuse: Run Arm64/x86-64 Linux ELF binaries on macOS Apple Silicon
   Meaningful workflow leverage for Mac-based toolchain and test-harness work if it proves stable.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-07-16
